indicators.name: large kitchen island
indicators.rationale: The kitchen island is too large and obstructive for comfortable computer work.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no chair or stool designed for extended computer use.

indicators.name: no dedicated lighting for task work
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears to be ambient and not focused on the workspace.

indicators.name: no dedicated area for computer work
indicators.rationale: The kitchen layout does not provide a designated space for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large kitchen island obstructs movement and there is no flat surface suitable for a laptop. There is no ergonomic seating or dedicated lighting for task work, and no dedicated area for computer work within the kitchen layout.
